name: Nitidulidae
diagnosis: The sap beetles are a family (Nitidulidae) of beetles.

genus_notes.glischrochilus: Glischrochilus (sometimes misspelled as Glisrochilus) is a genus of sap-feeding and predatory beetles under the family Nitidulidae, subfamily Cryptarchinae.
genus_notes.aethina: Aethina is a genus of beetles belonging to the family Nitidulidae.
genus_notes.stelidota: Stelidota is a genus of sap-feeding beetles in the family Nitidulidae.
genus_notes.epuraea: Epuraea is a genus of sap-feeding beetles in the family Nitidulidae.
genus_notes.brassicogethes: Brassicogethes is a genus of pollen beetles in the family Nitidulidae.
genus_notes.amphicrossus: Amphicrossus is a genus of sap-feeding beetles in the family Nitidulidae.
genus_notes.carpophilus: Carpophilus is a genus of sap beetles.
genus_notes.cryptarcha: Cryptarcha is a genus of sap beetles, insects in the family Nitidulidae.
genus_notes.phenolia: Phenolia is a genus of sap-feeding beetles in the family Nitidulidae.
genus_notes.nitidula: Nitidula is a genus of sap-feeding beetles in the family Nitidulidae.
genus_notes.caplothorax: Caplothorax is a genus of sap beetles.
